requirements.title: Mandatory Building Inspection Scheme boundary
requirements.constraint: Position the node as an early-warning and monitoring aid. Do not claim it replaces Registered Inspectors, prescribed inspections or prescribed repair supervision under MBIS.

requirements.title: Telecommunications equipment certification
requirements.constraint: Treat wireless modules as certification-sensitive. RFQ must ask whether the module is type-approved or testable against applicable HKCA telecommunications specifications.

requirements.title: Privacy-preserving sensing claim
requirements.constraint: Preserve the no-camera design choice in component selection and supplier questions. Avoid adding vision modules unless the user explicitly changes the privacy constraint.
